ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollinators" (
  "pollinator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollinator specimen */,
  "determined_by" TEXT /* Person who determined the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order classification of the pollinator */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family classification of the pollinator */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus classification of the pollinator */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species classification of the pollinator */,
  "origin_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the specimen originated */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time when the specimen was collected */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the specimen */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use type at the collection site */,
  "state_collected" TEXT /* State where the specimen was collected */,
  "county_collected" TEXT /* County where the specimen was collected */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the collection site in meters */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection site */,
  "average_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Average wind speed at collection time in km/h */,
  "air_temperature_c" REAL /* Air temperature at collection time in °C */,
  "relative_humidity_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity at collection time in % */,
  "plant_species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species associated with the pollinator */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat where the pollinator was found */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific weather conditions at the time of collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the specimen */,
  "specimen_status" TEXT /* Status of the specimen */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the specimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollinator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_order FOREIGN KEY ("order") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_land_use FOREIGN KEY ("land_use") REFERENCES land_uses ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_plant_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_origin_facility FOREIGN KEY ("origin_facility") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollinators_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES climate_conditions ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_uses" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Name of the land use type (e.g., National Wildlife Refuge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use type */,
  "land_use_area" REAL /* Area of the land use in square kilometers */,
  "land_use_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the land use type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the collector (e.g., organization, university) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the collector */,
  "collector_role" TEXT /* Role of the collector */,
  "collector_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is found */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use type of the location */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the location */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Nearest city to the location */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_uses ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_conditions" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for climate condition record */,
  "average_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Average wind speed at collection time in km/h */,
  "air_temperature_c" REAL /* Air temperature at collection time in °C */,
  "relative_humidity_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity at collection time in % */,
  "rainfall_mm" REAL /* Rainfall amount at the time of collection in millimeters */,
  "sunlight_hours" REAL /* Sunlight hours at the time of collection */,
  "pollution_index" REAL /* Pollution index at the time of collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order (e.g., Hymenoptera) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family (e.g., Andrenidae) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order to which the family belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus (e.g., Andrena) */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family to which the genus belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species (e.g., ternarius) */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genus to which the species belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pollinator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollinator specimen being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specimen data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pollinator_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollinator_id") REFERENCES pollinators ("pollinator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
